name: aws-best-practices
description: Source-linked AWS best practices for every service, organized by Well-Architected pillar and use case. No service descriptions, no pricing, no tutorials, just what AWS recommends and why.

interface.shortDescription: Source-linked AWS best practices for every service, by Well-Architected pillar and use case.
interface.longDescription: A curated, source-linked collection of AWS best practices for every AWS service, plus cross-service general guidance. Organized so an agent can find what matters for a specific use case (security, reliability, performance, cost, operations, sustainability) without inventing recommendations or researching from scratch.
